author: y4rr
content: Probe complete (Level 1): torchvision inception_v3 has 566 state_dict keys = 284 params + 188 BN buffers (run_mean/var) + 94 num_batches_tracked. 5 stem BasicConv2d (Conv2d_1a/2a/2b/3b/4a) + 11 Mixed (5b/c/d, 6a/b/c/d/e, 7a/b/c) + fc. F.avg_pool2d in branch_pool uses default count_include_pad=True — matches ferrotorch's hardcoded behaviour exactly. NO STOP-AND-REPORT for AvgPool. Pre-flight was wrong on this point — torchvision uses functional default not False. Saved keys+shapes to /tmp/inception_probe/.
